name: Adelle Corp
declaringWar: You stand in the way of my people. Let us solve this like warriors!
attacked: You dare have the courage to challenge nod, but no fear, for I will sweep you out of history.
defeated: You have the guts to call my body a corpse but beware, I know what will happen to our future- our tiberium future.
introduction: If I am cut, Do I not bleed?
tradeRequest: I am not always this generous, but we hope you take this rare opportunity we give you.

name: The New Movement
declaringWar: It is in  my Intentions to spread the word of Nod into your land.
attacked: Pitiful fool! Now we shall destroy you!
defeated: I see for the black hand has been unworthy to serve Kane.
introduction: If you would stay out of our way then you might live to tell your tale.
tradeRequest: I would be grateful if you agreed on the following proposal.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [non-air] units>

name: Petoria
startIntroPart1: 'From thid day fourth, i will now call my nation as PETORIA!
declaringWar: You are Worse then my Dad who Neglects Me!
attacked: One day, You May regret What You Have Done!
defeated: You Know Why You caused This. My dad who Always Neglacts me for THIS. AND SO IS YOU!!!
introduction: I may Welcome You to your Journey
hateHello: Is is only a matter of time?
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
tradeRequest: That Would be Very Good TYVM.

name: Seattle Commune
startIntroPart1: when the anarchy strikes, seattle becomes their breadbasket.
startIntroPart2: Howard unruh, you are our only hope of humanity's finest warboys!
declaringWar: i guess i should spread the anarchy to your country.
defeated: okay, let me say this... You are only hirting yourself!
introduction: it is howard unruh, lord of the anarchies. whats the haps!?.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.
